allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\Users\\fede\\Documents\\automatizaciondolibar; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\fede\\Documents\\automatizaciondolibar\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--port","8765" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\fede\\Documents\\automatizaciondolibar\\uvicorn_test.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\fede\\Documents\\automatizaciondolibar\\uvicorn_test.err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path "C:\\proyectos\\dolibarr-frontend\\PROGRESS.md"\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path "C:\\proyectos\\dolibarr-frontend\\PROGRESS.md" -Force | Out-Null; "# Sesion 3 - Frontend Dolibarr Automation`n`n## Estado`n" | Out-File -FilePath "C:\\proyectos\\dolibarr-frontend\\PROGRESS.md" -Encoding utf8 }; Get-Content "C:\\proyectos\\dolibarr-frontend\\PROGRESS.md" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\proyectos\\dolibarr-frontend"; $comps = @\("button","input","label","select","dialog","table","badge","card","dropdown-menu","sheet","tooltip","alert-dialog","form","separator","skeleton","progress","popover"\); foreach \($c in $comps\) { Write-Output "===INSTALANDO $c==="; npx --yes shadcn@latest add $c --yes --overwrite 2>&1 | Out-String })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\proyectos\\dolibarr-frontend'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Write-Output "Servidor iniciado")
